since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: Markets closed — Independence Day (observed)
cards.body: US equity markets are shut for Independence Day (observed), so the tape is frozen at the previous session's close. Everything below reflects that last close — not live trading — and refreshes when the market reopens.

cards.headline: Last close: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +1.07% · Gold +1.81% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. At the last close, 31% of 89 AI names were green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software did the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.56%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.63%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.70%, ISRG +5.87%, AAPL +4.84%, ADBE +4.14%, ADBE +4.14%. Laggards: TER -13.63%, KLAC -11.51%, AMBA -11.30%, CEVA -11.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.83% at $162.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
